packages.title: Device V2 backend launch acceptance small slices
Device V2 backend contract gate addendum
packages.releaseGate: Use if Batch 001 needs a separate backend-focused turn instead of folding contract work into D2LA-001.

packages.title: Device V2 DB-derived real-device launch acceptance preparation
packages.releaseGate: User confirms DB-derived sample scope, credential redaction boundary, clone/update strategy, collection protocols, and cleanup policy.

packages.title: Device V2 DB-derived sample export and UI import acceptance
packages.releaseGate: Publish after Batch 001 completes and the user confirms sample size, clone-code strategy, credential-ref-only rule, and cleanup boundary.

packages.title: Device V2 real collection acceptance fine-grained store phases
packages.releaseGate: Publish only after Batch 002 has produced a confirmed DB-derived imported sample set and the user approves controller-detect based real collection.

packages.title: Device V2 management lifecycle, safety, and cleanup acceptance
packages.releaseGate: Publish after DB-derived import is complete. User confirmed clean teardown: delete all cloned D2LA records, never delete originals, and do not purge import batches.

packages.title: Device V2 launch readiness decision report
packages.releaseGate: Publish after Batches 001-004 have completed, or after their blockers are accepted as sufficient launch evidence. P0 may be ACCEPTED RISK only with explicit human acceptance.

packages.title: Device V2 入库与管理模块真实执行回归
packages.releaseGate: 上一轮 dev-docs 自动化已归档后，本批次用于把自动化执行焦点切回 Device V2 入库与管理模块。该批次只补充一轮真实执行回归，不替代 Batch 005 的最终上线结论。
